/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libdc_encoder_service__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libdc_encoder_service__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/dc_encoder_service__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/dc_encoder_service/srv/detail/motor_pi__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/ros2_ws/src/landcore_ros2/build/dc_encoder_service:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libdc_encoder_service__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
